  {
    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复了因测试跳过导致配置泄漏的Bug。",
    "description": "原代码在`JustBeforeEach`中进行CPU资源检查并可能跳过测试。当跳过发生时，由于Ginkgo的机制，内层`When`块中用于临时修改kubelet配置的`BeforeEach`已经执行，但用于恢复配置的`AfterEach`却不会执行（因为`Skip()`发生在更外层）。这导致配置（特别是`KubeletPodResourcesListUseActivePods=false`这个特性门控）被泄漏到后续的所有串行测试中，破坏了其他测试（如`device_plugin_test.go`中的特定测试）的预期环境。",
    "evidence": "ginkgo.JustBeforeEach(func(ctx context.Context) {\n\t\t\t// this is a very rough check. We just want to rule out system that does NOT have enough resources\n\t\t\t_, cpuAlloc, _ = getLocalNodeCPUDetails(ctx, f)\n\t\t\tif cpuAlloc < minCoreCount {\n\t\t\t\tginkgo.Skip(fmt.Sprintf(\"Skipping the test because the CPU allocatable %v is less than %v\", cpuAlloc, minCoreCount))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})",
    "advice": "将检查从`JustBeforeEach`移至`BeforeEach`是正确的修复方法。这确保了在可能修改配置的内层`BeforeEach`执行之前就决定是否跳过测试，从而避免了配置的意外写入和泄漏。此修改与同一文件中第1120行的类似检查逻辑保持一致。",
    "confidence": 1,
    "severity": "High"
  }
]
commits:
[{'sha': 'bd85224799f6235e382806a5a86d565d061d214d', 'message': 'e2e_node: podresources: skip cpuAlloc check in BeforeEach, not JustBeforeEach

When the cpuAlloc check at podresources_test.go:1358 fires, it Skip()s
from a JustBeforeEach at the outer When() level. By that point the inner
When()'s tempSetCurrentKubeletConfig BeforeEach has already rewritten
the kubelet config (including, for the "restricted list output disabled"
block, setting KubeletPodResourcesListUseActivePods=false).

Ginkgo only runs AfterEach hooks at-or-shallower than the node where
Skip() fired (internal/group.go:252), so the inner AfterEach that would
restore the kubelet config is never invoked. The leaked feature gate
then propagates to every subsequent serial test, which breaks
device_plugin_test.go's "Does not keep device plugin assignments across
node reboots if fails admission" on e2-standard-2 nodes.

Moving the check to BeforeEach makes it fire before the inner
BeforeEach runs, so the config is never written. This matches the
identical check at podresources_test.go:1120.

Fixes #137602

Signed-off-by: Ryan Brewster <rpb@anthropic.com>'}]

commits:
[{'sha': 'bc2179d8824f41bce3e25bf563e7164989d094ea', 'message': 'pause: fix version drift in various files

The latest pause version is 3.10.2 but due to the introduction
of the PATCH level version to the pause image (previously was
only MAJOR.MINOR), various files have remained on an older
version. Either 3.10 or 3.10.1. Our validation with
build/dependencies.yaml ./hack/verify-external-dependencies.sh
did not account for that.'}, {'sha': 'f82b71dc0f2661685e5ccad9549933f84b1f79e1', 'message': 'build/dependencies.yaml: enforce PATCH level validation for pause

As it can be seen in build/pause/CHANGELOG.md the PATCH
level version for pause was introduced due to requirements
from the pause image for Windows. This however invalidated
our build/depedencies.yaml validation as it only accounted for
the MAJOR.MINOR version of pause (e.g. 3.10, not 3.10.1).

Enforce full SemVer validation for the pause image and move
all pause dependents under the same item of the YAML.'}]

commits:
[{'sha': '42ff148a8991208a34ce56dbeece62dc4b804779', 'message': 'scheduler: optimize evaluation of hostname-scoped inter-pod affinity

Introduces a "fast-track" evaluation path for inter-pod affinity
and anti-affinity rules that use the "kubernetes.io/hostname" topology key.

If only hostname topology is present (which is a common use case), we only need to check the current node.
There is no need to do O(N*M) cluster-wide scans.

Key Optimizations:
- Categorized affinity and anti-affinity terms into "host-scoped" (hostname)
  and "non-host-scoped" groups during PreFilter.
- Updated NodeInfo and Snapshot to specifically track pods with non-host-scoped
  anti-affinity, allowing the scheduler to skip global map lookups when only
  hostname rules are present.
- Updated the Filter phase to perform efficient local checks against pods
  already on the target node for hostname-scoped rules, rather than relying
  on global topology counts.
- Preserved "self-affinity" semantics: implemented a global check
  (hasMatchingHostScopedAffinityPodGlobally) to identify "first-of-kind"
  deployments, ensuring a pod can still land on an empty node if it matches
  its own affinity rules.

Testing & Correctness:
- Added `filtering_fast_track_test.go` to verify the new fast-path logic
  against various topology and namespace scenarios.
- Added `filtering_discrepancy_test.go` to ensure correctness when a pod
  has multiple affinity terms that must be satisfied by a single existing pod.'}]

    "conclusion": "为GET请求和非递归LIST请求引入新的监控指标。",
    "description": "新增的`RecordStorageGetMetrics`函数和相关的计数器变量（`getStorageCount`, `getStorageNumFetched`, `getStorageNumSelectorEvals`, `getStorageNumReturned`）旨在监控GET请求的存储层性能。然而，在`store.go`的`Get`函数实现中，`numEvald`参数被硬编码为0。对于GET请求，这通常是正确的，因为GET是点查询，不涉及选择器评估。但是，如果未来GET操作逻辑发生变化（例如，需要评估某些条件），这个硬编码值可能变得不准确。目前的设计缺乏灵活性。",
    "evidence": "`func RecordStorageGetMetrics(groupResource schema.GroupResource, numFetched, numEvald, numReturned int) { ... }` 被调用时，在`store.go`的`Get`函数中，`numEvald`参数被固定为0：`metrics.RecordStorageGetMetrics(s.groupResource, numFetched, 0, numReturned)`",
    "advice": "考虑将`numEvald`参数的计算逻辑显式化。可以添加一个注释说明为什么对于GET操作它是0（例如，“GET是点查询，不涉及选择器评估”）。或者，如果确定GET永远不需要评估，可以将`RecordStorageGetMetrics`函数的签名改为只接受`numFetched`和`numReturned`，并移除`numEvald`参数，以简化接口并避免误导。",

commits:
[{'sha': '0bafcc27b71227cc20235678a0947b375081e677', 'message': "validation-gen: add +k8s:maxProperties declarative validation tag

Add a new +k8s:maxProperties=<N> declarative validation tag that enforces
a maximum number of entries in a map field. This corresponds to the
OpenAPI/JSON Schema maxProperties keyword.

Changes:
- Add MaxProperties[K comparable, V any] runtime validation function to
  k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/validate with 'maxProperties' origin.
- Add TestMaxProperties to limits_test.go covering 0/1/2-item maps and
  negative max boundary cases.
- Add maxPropertiesTagValidator to validation-gen validators/limits.go:
  - Restricted to map types only (mirrors +k8s:maxItems for slices)
  - Uses ShortCircuit flag to prevent DoS via oversized-map validation
  - Parses value via util.ParseInt, rejects negative values
  - Stability level: Alpha
- Annotate StorageClass.Parameters with +k8s:maxProperties=512 as the
  first consumer, replacing the hand-written len(params) > 512 guard.
- Add CHANGELOG entry.

Fixes: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/138112
Signed-off-by: sAchin-680 <mrmister680@gmail.com>"}]

    "description": "代码变更将排序类型重命名为更通用的 `containerSort` 和 `podSandboxSort`，并修改了 `Less` 方法的逻辑。新的逻辑首先按 `Metadata.Attempt` 降序排序，然后按 `CreatedAt` 降序排序，最后按 `Id` 升序排序。然而，在 `containerSort.Less` 方法中，当 `Metadata` 为 `nil` 或 `Attempt` 相等时，代码直接进入次级排序（按 `CreatedAt`）。这可能导致当 `Metadata` 为 `nil` 时，`b[i].Metadata.Attempt` 的访问在逻辑上被跳过，但代码结构上存在一个潜在的可读性问题：`if` 条件 `(b[i].Metadata.Attempt == b[j].Metadata.Attempt)` 在 `Metadata` 为 `nil` 时会导致 panic。虽然外层条件 `b[i].Metadata == nil || b[j].Metadata == nil` 会先被检查，从而避免 panic，但将 `Attempt` 的比较放在同一个 `||` 条件中，逻辑上不够清晰，容易引起误解。",
    "evidence": "if b[i].Metadata == nil || b[j].Metadata == nil || (b[i].Metadata.Attempt == b[j].Metadata.Attempt) {",
    "advice": "建议将 `Metadata` 为 `nil` 的情况和 `Attempt` 相等的情况分开处理，以提高代码可读性和健壮性。例如，可以先检查 `Metadata` 是否为 `nil`，如果任一为 `nil`，则视为 `Attempt` 相等（或赋予一个默认值），然后进入次级排序。这样可以更清晰地表达意图，并避免读者误以为存在空指针风险。",

    "evidence": "func (s *store) GetCurrentResourceVersion(ctx context.Context) (uint64, error) {
	preparedKey, err := s.prepareKey(s.resourcePrefix, false)
	if err != nil {
		return 0, err
	}

	startTime := time.Now()
	getResp, err := s.client.Kubernetes.Get(ctx, preparedKey, kubernetes.GetOptions{})
	metrics.RecordEtcdRequest("getCurrentResourceVersion", s.groupResource, err, startTime)
	if err != nil {
		return 0, err
	}

	if getResp.Revision == 0 {
		return 0, fmt.Errorf("the current resource version must be greater than 0")
	}
	return uint64(getResp.Revision), nil
}",

    "conclusion": "优化 GetCurrentResourceVersion 方法，避免不必要的列表操作以提升性能并减少指标污染。",
    "description": "原实现通过执行一次 List 操作（即使限制为1）来获取当前的资源版本（ResourceVersion）。这会产生不必要的网络开销、计算开销，并会污染 List 相关的监控指标（如延迟、QPS）。新实现直接对资源前缀（resourcePrefix）执行一个 Get 操作来获取其修订版本号（Revision），这更直接、高效，且将指标记录在更合适的 \"getCurrentResourceVersion\" 操作下。",
    "evidence": "原代码：\n- `err := s.GetList(ctx, s.resourcePrefix, storage.ListOptions{Predicate: pred}, emptyList)`\n新代码：\n- `getResp, err := s.client.Kubernetes.Get(ctx, preparedKey, kubernetes.GetOptions{})`\n- `metrics.RecordEtcdRequest(\"getCurrentResourceVersion\", s.groupResource, err, startTime)`",
    "advice": "这是一个很好的优化。建议确保 `s.prepareKey(s.resourcePrefix, false)` 返回的键（例如可能是 `s.resourcePrefix` 本身）在 etcd 中存在一个对应的、可以返回有效修订版本号的条目。通常，资源前缀本身可能不是一个有效的键，需要确认 etcd3 存储层的具体实现（例如，是否有一个特殊的哨兵键来表示集合的修订版本）。从上下文看，`s.resourcePrefix` 可能指向一个代表集合的键，其 Get 操作返回的 `Revision` 就是该集合的当前修订版本，这是合理的。",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "severity": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "type": "Readability",
    "conclusion": "简化了 GetCurrentResourceVersion 的逻辑，移除了对多个无关包的依赖。",
    "description": "新代码移除了对 `strconv`、`fields` 和 `labels` 包的导入和使用。逻辑从“执行列表并解析列表的 ResourceVersion 字符串”简化为“直接获取键并读取其 Revision 数值”。代码行数减少，意图更清晰，依赖更少。",
    "evidence": "导入移除：\n- `\"strconv\"`\n- `\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/fields\"`\n- `\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/labels\"`\n逻辑简化：移除了创建 `SelectionPredicate`、调用 `GetList`、获取 `ListAccessor`、进行字符串转换（`strconv.Atoi`）等一系列步骤。",
    "advice": "代码可读性提升明显。无进一步建议。",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "severity": "Low"
  },
  {
    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复了原方法在列表为空时可能返回错误资源版本（0）的逻辑缺陷。",
    "description": "原方法通过列表操作获取 ResourceVersion。如果集群中该资源类型下没有任何对象，`emptyListAccessor.GetResourceVersion()` 返回的字符串可能无法被 `strconv.Atoi` 正确解析，或者解析结果为0，导致方法返回错误或触发 `currentResourceVersion == 0` 的检查而失败。新方法直接查询一个代表集合状态的键的修订版本，理论上更可靠，避免了“空列表”这一边界条件。",
    "evidence": "原代码检查：`if currentResourceVersion == 0 { return 0, fmt.Errorf(...) }`。这表明原逻辑已经意识到返回0可能是个问题。新代码检查：`if getResp.Revision == 0 { return 0, fmt.Errorf(...) }`。虽然检查保留，但触发条件更明确（etcd 返回的修订版本为0，这在一个正常运行的集群中不应发生）。",
    "advice": "保留对 Revision == 0 的检查是合理的，作为一道防御性编程的屏障。需要确保 `s.prepareKey` 和 `s.client.Kubernetes.Get` 的语义与预期一致，即对资源前缀的 Get 操作能返回有意义的修订版本。建议查看相关 `prepareKey` 方法的实现或 etcd3 存储层的设计文档以确认。",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "severity": "Medium"
  }
]

commits:
[{'sha': 'f69c6f6aaa4ee4c7c8f726510f5fbebb16c34e92', 'message': "Use RunE instead of Run in kubectl create subcommands

All kubectl create subcommands used Cobra's Run field with
cmdutil.CheckErr, which calls os.Exit on error. This prevents
programmatic use of the create commands as a library since errors
cannot be caught by the caller.

Switch all 23 cobra.Command definitions in the create package
from Run to RunE so that errors are returned through the normal
Cobra error chain instead of triggering os.Exit."}]

commits:
[{'sha': 'bf31fea409105fa8503acc6aa25a6917378e25ae', 'message': 'kubelet: parallelize container kills in SyncPod Step 3

SyncPod Step 3 currently kills containers sequentially. Each
killContainer call blocks for up to terminationGracePeriodSeconds
(including preStop hooks), so a container whose kill completes quickly
cannot restart until all sibling kills finish. With N containers and
a grace period of G seconds, the first-killed container waits up to
(N-1)*G seconds before restarting.

Parallelize Step 3 kills using goroutines and sync.WaitGroup, matching
the pattern already used by killContainersWithSyncResult (called from
KillPod in Step 2). Results are collected via a buffered channel and
added to the PodSyncResult after all goroutines complete, preserving
thread safety and the existing fail-fast return on error.

Fixes #138146

Signed-off-by: Kc Balusu <kcbalusu@meta.com>'}]

commits:
[{'sha': 'bf31fea409105fa8503acc6aa25a6917378e25ae', 'message': 'kubelet: parallelize container kills in SyncPod Step 3

SyncPod Step 3 currently kills containers sequentially. Each
killContainer call blocks for up to terminationGracePeriodSeconds
(including preStop hooks), so a container whose kill completes quickly
cannot restart until all sibling kills finish. With N containers and
a grace period of G seconds, the first-killed container waits up to
(N-1)*G seconds before restarting.

Parallelize Step 3 kills using goroutines and sync.WaitGroup, matching
the pattern already used by killContainersWithSyncResult (called from
KillPod in Step 2). Results are collected via a buffered channel and
added to the PodSyncResult after all goroutines complete, preserving
thread safety and the existing fail-fast return on error.

Fixes #138146

Signed-off-by: Kc Balusu <kcbalusu@meta.com>'}]

commits:
[{'sha': '525954af802616c2ba0adb1ca97934f5ae89890b', 'message': 'kubectl debug: make sysadmin profile OS-aware for Windows node debugging

Extend the sysadmin profile to auto-detect Windows nodes via the
kubernetes.io/os label and apply Windows Host Process Container (HPC)
settings instead of Linux-specific privileged mode.

When debugging a Windows node with --profile sysadmin:
- Sets pod-level WindowsOptions.HostProcess=true
- Sets container-level RunAsUserName to NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM (overridable
  via --custom flag)
- Enables HostNetwork
- Clears any Linux security context
- Skips HostPID, HostIPC, and /host volume mount (not applicable)

RunAsUserName is set at container level rather than pod level so users
can override it using the existing --custom flag mechanism.

Linux node behavior remains unchanged.'}]

[
  {
    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复清理逻辑，使其能感知对象UID变化，避免等待错误对象。",
    "description": "在清理（Cleanup）函数中，先获取待删除对象的UID，然后在等待删除完成的循环中，不仅检查对象是否存在，还检查其UID是否与之前捕获的UID一致。如果对象存在但UID不同，说明原对象已被删除并重新创建（例如，被其他测试或控制器重建），此时应停止等待，视为清理成功。原逻辑仅检查对象是否存在，如果对象被重建，会错误地认为原对象仍在，导致等待超时或测试失败。",
    "evidence": "在 `applyAPIService.Cleanup` 和 `applyCRD.Cleanup` 中，新增了 `uid` 变量的捕获（`if obj, err := client...Get(...); err == nil { uid = obj.UID }`）以及在等待循环中新增了 `case err == nil && obj.UID != uid:` 的判断分支。",
    "advice": "代码变更逻辑正确，解决了测试清理过程中可能因对象被意外重建而导致的等待问题。这是一个健壮性改进。",
    "confidence": 0.95,
    "severity": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "type": "Readability",
    "conclusion": "修复清理逻辑，使其能感知对象UID变化，避免等待错误对象。",
    "description": "等待循环中的逻辑从原来的 `if-else` 结构重构为 `switch-case` 结构，清晰地列出了四种情况：对象不存在、对象存在但UID不同、发生其他错误、对象存在且UID相同（仍需等待）。这提高了代码的可读性和可维护性，使每种状态的处理意图更加明确。",

    "evidence": "例如在文件`pkg/controller/certificates/rootcacertpublisher/publisher.go`中，修改从 `fmt.Errorf(\"tombstone contained object that is not a ConfigMap %#v\", obj)` 变为 `fmt.Errorf(\"tombstone contained object that is not a ConfigMap %#v\", tombstone.Obj)`。其他文件中的修改模式完全一致。",
    "advice": "这是一个正确的修复，无需额外建议。",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "severity": "Low"
  }
]

commits:
[{'sha': '4e91c012367a121737bfc5010761aa34c79f1a5b', 'message': 'ktesting: support Init inside synctest bubble

Deadline is available inside a synctest bubble, but calling it panics. To
support constructing a TContext inside a bubble, we have to catch the panic
because there is no API to detect a bubble in advance. Detecting a panic is
then also used to set the result of TContext.IsSyncTest.

While at it, cleaning up the code a bit and adding unit tests for the Deadline
behavior.'}]

commits:
[{'sha': 'b3c8a195e83877f6f441cbd8ecaef8138397e114', 'message': 'topologymanager: add CPU-attached NUMA filter option

Large NUMA systems such as NVIDIA Grace-class (GB200/300) can expose
many NUMA nodes to the OS even though only a small subset of those nodes
have CPUs attached. When TopologyManager is configured to allow the full
NUMA count, topology hint generation can still scale poorly across that
full NUMA universe and block pod admission before device Allocate() is
reached.

Add a new TopologyManager policy option, restrict-to-cpu-numa-nodes, to
make this behavior explicit and opt-in.
When enabled, TopologyManager computes an effective NUMA-node set from
NUMA nodes with CPUs attached and propagates that same view to
topology-aware hint providers.

With this change:
- TopologyManager uses the filtered NUMA-node set for policy creation
  and NUMA accounting.
- CPUManager and MemoryManager generate hints only across that filtered
  NUMA-node set.
- DeviceManager projects device topology onto the same filtered set
  using NUMA distances so hint generation and aligned allocation remain
  consistent.

This bounds hint generation on CPU-less NUMA topologies without
changing default behavior.'}]

[{'sha': 'b3c8a195e83877f6f441cbd8ecaef8138397e114', 'message': 'topologymanager: add CPU-attached NUMA filter option

Large NUMA systems such as NVIDIA Grace-class (GB200/300) can expose
many NUMA nodes to the OS even though only a small subset of those nodes
have CPUs attached. When TopologyManager is configured to allow the full
NUMA count, topology hint generation can still scale poorly across that
full NUMA universe and block pod admission before device Allocate() is
reached.

Add a new TopologyManager policy option, restrict-to-cpu-numa-nodes, to
make this behavior explicit and opt-in.
When enabled, TopologyManager computes an effective NUMA-node set from
NUMA nodes with CPUs attached and propagates that same view to
topology-aware hint providers.

With this change:
- TopologyManager uses the filtered NUMA-node set for policy creation
  and NUMA accounting.
- CPUManager and MemoryManager generate hints only across that filtered
  NUMA-node set.
- DeviceManager projects device topology onto the same filtered set
  using NUMA distances so hint generation and aligned allocation remain
  consistent.

This bounds hint generation on CPU-less NUMA topologies without
changing default behavior.'}]

commits:
[{'sha': '097ac3ad1520d43774338b9a7685679d3678430a', 'message': "pluginmanager: log backoff/in-progress skips at V(4) in reconciler

Previously, when the reconciler skipped a Register or Unregister
operation because goroutinemap reported the operation was already
running (IsAlreadyExists) or because exponential backoff was in
effect (IsExponentialBackoff), both conditions were silently dropped.
This made it very difficult to diagnose situations where a plugin
socket appeared in the desired state of world but registration was
being continuously deferred -- for example, when a CSI driver's
NodeGetInfo RPC blocks for an extended period waiting on topology
labels, causing the first attempt to time out and trigger backoff.

Replace the compound negative guard with an explicit if/else chain:
- IsAlreadyExists: log at V(4) operation already in progress
- IsExponentialBackoff: log at V(4) exponential backoff in effect
  (includes the backoff error string so remaining duration is visible)
- all other errors: continue to log at Error level as before

With --v=4 or higher operators can now observe that registration is
being held back by backoff and roughly how long the delay is without
any additional tooling.

Signed-off-by: Humble Devassy Chirammal <humble.devassy@gmail.com>"}]

commits:
[{'sha': '46526f2506fec96a089500435013470b8af8000e', 'message': 'pluginmanager: re-dial socket for NotifyRegistrationStatus after RegisterPlugin

The registration flow dials the plugin socket once before GetInfo, then
reuses that same gRPC connection for all subsequent calls including the
final NotifyRegistrationStatus (notifyPlugin). This works fine when the
plugin handler returns quickly, but CSI drivers
can block inside handler.RegisterPlugin for 60 seconds or more while
waiting for topology labels to propagate (NodeGetInfo). Over that span
the original connection can be torn down by the plugin side, causing the
NotifyRegistrationStatus delivery to silently fail.

When NotifyRegistrationStatus is not delivered:
- node-driver-registrar v2.9+ treats the missing notification as a
  permanent failure and calls os.Exit(1), restarting the container.
- Depending on DaemonSet liveness probe configuration, the restart may
  not be triggered at all, leaving the driver unregistered indefinitely.

Fix: after handler.RegisterPlugin returns, establish a fresh dial to the
plugin socket before sending the notification. If the socket has
disappeared (plugin process died during registration) the fresh dial
fails immediately; we clean up local state and return an error so the
goroutinemap can retry when the socket reappears.

The early-exit paths (unknown handler, ValidatePlugin failure) continue
to reuse the original connection because those paths return before any
long-running call.

Signed-off-by: Humble Devassy Chirammal <humble.devassy@gmail.com>'}]

commits:
[{'sha': '8442ec19a49a250a85ab9fc15fd471ec4e15f6dd', 'message': 'localupcluster: kill the process group on Stop

Some commands are wrapped by sudo (KUBELET_SUDO / PROXY_SUDO in
local-up-cluster.sh).  Go's exec.CommandContext sends SIGKILL only to
the top-level process (sudo) when its context is cancelled.  Sudo does
not forward signals to its children, so the actual component process is
orphaned: it keeps running and holds its ports even after cmd.Stop()
returns.

Fix: set SysProcAttr.Setpgid = true so every launched process is placed
in its own process group.  In Stop, kill the entire process group before
cancelling the context.  For sudo-wrapped commands such as kubelet and
kube-proxy this is done via "sudo -n kill" so that root-owned children
are also reached; a direct kill(-pgid, SIGKILL) is used as a fallback
if sudo fails.'}]

    "conclusion": "移除了基于本地PV节点亲和性进行节点预筛选的功能。",
    "description": "代码变更移除了 `GetEligibleNodes` 方法及其相关调用，该方法原本用于在调度早期（PreFilter阶段）根据Pod已绑定的本地持久卷（Local PV）的节点亲和性来缩小候选节点范围。此功能被移除，意味着调度器将不再利用已绑定本地PV的节点亲和性信息来优化调度过程。这可能导致调度器在后续阶段（如Filter）需要评估更多节点，增加计算开销，尤其是在集群规模较大时。",
    "evidence": "文件 `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/volumebinding/binder.go` 中删除了 `GetEligibleNodes` 方法的声明和实现。文件 `pkg/scheduler/framework/plugins/volumebinding/volume_binding.go` 中删除了在 `PreFilter` 方法中调用 `GetEligibleNodes` 并返回 `PreFilterResult` 的代码。",
    "advice": "审查此变更的意图。如果是为了修复一个缺陷或简化逻辑，请确保有相应的设计文档或Issue说明。同时，需要评估移除该优化对调度性能的潜在影响，特别是对于大量使用本地PV的场景。如果性能影响显著，可能需要考虑其他优化手段。",

    "advice": "对于 `\"existing PVC\"` 测试用例，如果目的是测试一个已绑定的普通PV（非本地），当前的PV定义（空Spec）可能过于简化。建议至少设置 `Spec.ClaimRef` 或 `Status.Phase` 为 `Bound` 以更真实地模拟场景。不过，由于该测试的重点是PVC存在性，且相关功能已移除，此问题严重性较低。新增的测试用例设计良好，验证了功能变更后的正确行为。",

commits:
[{'sha': 'c2da7acc9da07ed3378966fb52aab2de594e0e5e', 'message': "Fix sourceFile goroutine leak by adding ctx to NewSourceFile()

NewSourceFile() spawned goroutines with no exit mechanism, causing a
goroutine leak. Add a ctx context.Context parameter to NewSourceFile()
so goroutines can exit cleanly when the context is canceled.

- Replace wait.Forever with wait.UntilWithContext in startWatch
- Add ctx.Done() cases in run() and doWatch() select loops
- Make the UndeltaStore send callback context-aware to unblock
  channel sends on cancellation
- Defer-close the fsnotify watcher on context cancellation

For kubelet, the existing ctx from makePodSourceConfig() is passed
directly. Tests use the context from ktesting.NewTestContext(t),
which is canceled when the test ends.

Signed-off-by: Travis O'Neal <wtravisoneal@gmail.com>"}]

commits:
[{'sha': 'c2da7acc9da07ed3378966fb52aab2de594e0e5e', 'message': "Fix sourceFile goroutine leak by adding ctx to NewSourceFile()

NewSourceFile() spawned goroutines with no exit mechanism, causing a
goroutine leak. Add a ctx context.Context parameter to NewSourceFile()
so goroutines can exit cleanly when the context is canceled.

- Replace wait.Forever with wait.UntilWithContext in startWatch
- Add ctx.Done() cases in run() and doWatch() select loops
- Make the UndeltaStore send callback context-aware to unblock
  channel sends on cancellation
- Defer-close the fsnotify watcher on context cancellation

For kubelet, the existing ctx from makePodSourceConfig() is passed
directly. Tests use the context from ktesting.NewTestContext(t),
which is canceled when the test ends.

Signed-off-by: Travis O'Neal <wtravisoneal@gmail.com>"}]

    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复了循环移除节点污点时因缓存延迟导致污点被重新添加的竞态条件。",
    "description": "原代码在循环中逐个调用`RemoveTaintOffNode`移除污点。每次循环迭代都会从API服务器缓存中读取节点状态，移除一个污点，然后打补丁。如果缓存更新延迟（例如，前一次补丁的watch事件尚未传播），后续迭代会基于过时的节点状态（包含之前已移除的污点）生成补丁，导致已移除的污点被重新添加。由于循环已经移过了该污点，它永远不会被清理。新的实现通过调用支持可变参数的`removeNodeTaint`函数，在一次操作中移除所有污点，从而避免了此竞态条件。",
    "evidence": "func RemoveTaintsOffNode(ctx context.Context, c clientset.Interface, nodeName string, taints []v1.Taint) {\n+\ttaintPtrs := make([]*v1.Taint, len(taints))\n+\tfor i := range taints {\n+\t\ttaintPtrs[i] = &taints[i]\n+\t}\n+\terr := removeNodeTaint(ctx, c, nodeName, nil, taintPtrs...)\n+\tgomega.ExpectWithOffset(1, err).NotTo(gomega.HaveOccurred())\n\tfor _, taint := range taints {\n-\t\tRemoveTaintOffNode(ctx, c, nodeName, taint)\n+\t\tverifyThatTaintIsGone(ctx, c, nodeName, &taint)\n\t}\n}",
    "advice": "实现正确。建议在函数注释中明确说明此变更解决了潜在的竞态条件，以帮助未来的维护者理解。",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "severity": "High"
  },
  {
    "type": "Readability",
    "conclusion": "将移除操作与验证操作分离，逻辑更清晰。",
    "description": "原代码将移除污点（`RemoveTaintOffNode`）和验证污点已移除（`verifyThatTaintIsGone`）耦合在同一个循环中。新代码将这两个职责分离：首先通过一次调用`removeNodeTaint`移除所有污点，然后在后续循环中逐一验证每个污点是否确实被移除。这使得代码意图更明确：先执行批量操作，再进行验证。",
    "evidence": "+\terr := removeNodeTaint(ctx, c, nodeName, nil, taintPtrs...)\n+\tgomega.ExpectWithOffset(1, err).NotTo(gomega.HaveOccurred())\n\tfor _, taint := range taints {\n+\t\tverifyThatTaintIsGone(ctx, c, nodeName, &taint)\n\t}",
    "advice": "当前分离是合理的。可以考虑将验证循环也提取为一个独立的辅助函数（例如`verifyTaintsAreGone`），以进一步提升可读性和可测试性，但非必需。",
    "confidence": 0.8,

  }
]
commits: [{'sha': 'acf8469cb5485e7c7f91ab968a2151aacb59806e', 'message': "Tests: Call removeNodeTaint variadically instead of in a loop\n\nI believe there is a sneaky timing/caching issue here. When RemoveTaintsOffNode removes taints one at a time in a loop, each iteration reads the node from the API server cache, removes one taint, and patches. If the cache is stale for any iteration (still reflecting the state before the previous patch's watch event propagated) the patch sends the full stale list minus only the current taint, effectively re-adding the taint that was just removed in the prior step. Since the loop has already moved past that taint, it's never cleaned up. verifyThatTaintIsGone (previously called once per loop) doesn't catch this because it only checks whether the current taint was removed, not whether previously removed taints were re-introduced. The fix is to remove all taints in a single cycle instead of looping, which removeNodeTaint's variadic signature already supports."}]

[
  {
    "type": "Bug",
    "conclusion": "修复了Pod启动SLI计算中重复排除init容器和镜像拉取时间的问题。",
    "description": "在`ObservedPodOnWatch`方法中，计算`podStartSLOduration`时，从总启动时间中减去了`totalImagesPullingTime`和`totalInitContainerRuntime`。然而，如果镜像拉取时间或init容器运行时间为0，减法操作仍然会执行，这可能导致负的持续时间。虽然代码逻辑意图正确，但减法前缺少对正值条件的检查，可能在某些边界情况下（例如时间记录不完整）导致计算错误。",
    "evidence": "pkg/kubelet/util/pod_startup_latency_tracker.go 第130-140行:\n```go\npodStartSLOduration := podStartingDuration\n\ntotalImagesPullingTime := calculateImagePullingTime(state.imagePullSessions)\nif totalImagesPullingTime > 0 {\n    podStartSLOduration -= totalImagesPullingTime\n}\n\nif state.totalInitContainerRuntime > 0 {\n    podStartSLOduration -= state.totalInitContainerRuntime\n}\n```",
    "advice": "建议在减法操作后添加一个保护性检查，确保`podStartSLOduration`不为负值。例如：`if podStartSLOduration < 0 { podStartSLOduration = 0 }`。虽然当前逻辑在正常数据下是安全的，但防御性编程可以避免潜在的指标异常。",
    "confidence": 0.7,
    "severity": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "type": "Readability",
    "conclusion": "代码变更引入了Pod启动延迟跟踪的增强功能。",
    "description": "在`kubeGenericRuntimeManager`结构体中新增的字段`podInitContainerTimeRecorder`的命名与接口类型`PodInitContainerTimeRecorder`高度相似，容易造成混淆。字段名使用小写开头符合Go的导出规则，但`Recorder`作为后缀可能暗示它是一个具体的实现实例，而接口名也包含`Recorder`，这降低了代码的清晰度。",
    "evidence": "pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/kuberuntime_manager.go 第185行:\n```go\n// Records first initContainer start time and last initContainer finish time\npodInitContainerTimeRecorder PodInitContainerTimeRecorder\n```",
    "advice": "考虑将字段名改为更具体的名称，例如`initContainerTimeRecorder`，以区别于接口类型`PodInitContainerTimeRecorder`，提高可读性。",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "severity": "Low"
  },
  {
    "type": "Design",
    "conclusion": "改进了Pod启动SLI指标的计算，排除了非立即可调度和有状态Pod。",
    "description": "在`SyncPod`方法中，新增的代码块用于记录init容器的启动和完成时间。然而，记录init容器启动时间的代码位于一个名为`start`的闭包函数中，该函数用于启动容器。这意味着每次尝试启动容器（包括重试）都会调用记录器，可能导致对同一个init容器的多次`Started`记录。虽然`perPodState`中的`currentInitContainerStart`可能被覆盖，但这仍可能引入不必要的调用或轻微的时序误差。",
    "evidence": "pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/kuberuntime_manager.go 第1369-1377行:\n```go\nif typeName == \"init container\" {\n    // Don't measure restartable init containers (sidecars)\n    if !podutil.IsRestartableInitContainer(spec.container) {\n        if m.podInitContainerTimeRecorder != nil {\n            m.podInitContainerTimeRecorder.RecordInitContainerStarted(pod.UID, time.Now())\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n这段代码位于`start`闭包内，该闭包在`startContainer`函数中被调用。",
    "advice": "考虑将init容器启动时间的记录移到更合适的位置，确保每个init容器只记录一次启动事件。例如，可以在确定容器即将被创建（且尚未存在）时记录。需要审查容器启动流程，找到更准确的钩子点。",
    "confidence": 0.6,
    "severity": "Medium"
  }
]

commits:
[{'sha': '66a2bb15db1821b774a704b0cb504d82759bf2d6', 'message': 'scheduler: add PreQueueingHint to narrow pod evaluation on events

Add PreQueueingHintFn to the scheduling framework, called once per
event to return a set of pod keys to evaluate instead of scanning
all unschedulable pods. The DRA plugin uses this for ResourceClaim
events to return only the owning pod for per-pod claims, reducing
the requeue path from O(N) to O(1). Falls back to evaluating all
pods when PreQueueingHintFn is nil or returns nil (shared claims).'}, {'sha': '23a847d1ba02007e3d5369af965fc9253b628336', 'message': 'scheduler: async event queue for ResourceClaim processing

Decouple ResourceClaim Add/Update event handling from the informer
thread using a claimQueue workqueue. The informer handler enqueues a
lightweight item; a dedicated worker goroutine drains the queue and
calls MoveAllToActiveOrBackoffQueue (which benefits from
PreQueueingHint). This prevents the informer thread from being
blocked on scheduling queue lock acquisition during claim events.

Similar to the pattern used for EndpointSlice controllers in PR
#134739 and the approach proposed in #136221.'}]

    "evidence": "pkg/volume/util/operationexecutor/operation_generator.go:\n- detailedErr := fmt.Errorf(\"error marking pvc %s as resized: %w\", util.GetPersistentVolumeClaimQualifiedName(pvc), err)\n- detailedErr := fmt.Errorf(\"error updating pvc %s condition for fs resize: %w\", util.GetPersistentVolumeClaimQualifiedName(pvc), err)",
    "advice": "这是一个正确的修复。在Go 1.13+中，使用%w包装错误是推荐做法，以便后续使用errors.Is或errors.As进行检查。",
    "confidence": 1,
    "severity": "Medium"
  },
  {
    "type": "Design",
    "conclusion": "提升日志级别，将创建目录失败从V(4)改为Error",
    "description": "在pkg/volume/util/atomic_writer.go中，创建新的时间戳目录失败的错误日志级别从V(4)（调试级别）提升到了Error级别。这是一个关键的操作失败，应该以更高的日志级别记录，以便在出现问题时能够被及时发现和告警。",
    "evidence": "pkg/volume/util/atomic_writer.go: klog.Errorf(\"%s: error creating new ts data directory: %v\", w.logContext, err)",
    "advice": "这是一个合理的变更，确保了关键错误的可见性。",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "severity": "Medium"
  }
]
commits:
[{'sha': '4964f699db3be47598cc377637055a4776cc515f', 'message': 'metrics-server: update to v0.8.1 and fix stale RBAC resourceName

Update metrics-server addon from v0.8.0 to v0.8.1.

Also fix the ClusterRole resource-reader which still referenced the
deployment name from v0.7.1 (metrics-server-v0.7.1). The addon-resizer
nanny needs get/patch permission on the current deployment name to
function correctly; without this fix the nanny requests would be
denied by RBAC.

Additionally update the README link from the archived
kubernetes-incubator org to the current kubernetes-sigs org.

Signed-off-by: Humble Devassy Chirammal <humble.devassy@gmail.com>'}]

[{'sha': '2cb9fdf5785ba9306daa449ed0a721ea4f1c43fc', 'message': 'volume: fix incorrect error and log messages across volume plugins

Fix several incorrect error and log messages in volume plugins that
produce confusing or incomplete output during troubleshooting:

- Fix "MountMount.NodeExpandVolume" to "MountVolume.NodeExpandVolume"
  in node_expander.go (2 occurrences)
- Fix "MountVolume.NodeExapndVolume" to "MountVolume.NodeExpandVolume"
  in node_expander.go and operation_generator.go (2 occurrences)
- Fix iscsi mkdir error log that prints literal "error" instead of the
  actual error value
- Fix "error ummounting" to "error unmounting" in subpath handling
- Fix malformed "with :" in teardown error messages in configmap,
  secret, projected, and downwardapi volume plugins
- Fix duplicated "is is" in operation_generator.go comment

Signed-off-by: Humble Devassy Chirammal <humble.devassy@gmail.com>'}]

  }
]
